name: AARYAN PATEL
aboutMe: I spend most of my free time working on projects and tinkering with my homelab, whatever looks interesting. I like picking up new tech and seeing how far I can push an idea. When I'm not coding or building something new, I'm usually at the gym or watching UFC.

courses.name: Privacy, Cryptography, Network and Data Security

experience.label: RBC - Sep 2025
experience.title: DevOps Engineer Intern
experience.summary: Shipped multi-cloud CI/CD with Helm and GitHub Actions, sped up container security scanning with Aqua, and enforced trusted Docker image signing in production.
description: Engineered a multi-cloud deployment architecture for distributed app across Azure and AWS clusters by using GitHub Actions pipelines and Helm charts to orchestrate the build and release of 3 Dockerized microservices
Accelerated container security scanning speeds by over 77% for Capital Markets teams by migrating legacy scanning protocols to Aqua SaaS Cloud, significantly reducing Jenkins CI/CD pipeline latency
Enabled verification of Docker image signatures for an application by provisioning Virtual Machines with custom CA bundles, ensuring only trusted code runs in production

experience.label: Scrawlr - May 2025
experience.title: Backend/API Developer
experience.summary: Built Fastify/Postgres/Redis APIs for the browser-extension platform, standardized engineering with Cursor rule packs, and cut API scaffolding time with an AI-driven codegen pipeline.
description: Contributed to scalable backend APIs for browser-extension platform, using Node.js + Fastify with Postgres and Redis to layer real-time conversation and personalized content onto any webpage

Standardized codebase by authoring reusable Cursor rule packs that enforce layered architecture, uniform error handling, and code consistency, enabling faster, conflict-free feature rollouts across teams

Architected an AI-driven code-gen pipeline that ingests product docs & Cursor rules to auto-scaffold Fastify services, database schemas, cache layers, and Vitest tests, cutting API development from months to days

experience.label: RBC - Sep 2024
experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.summary: Delivered a React/Next.js trading analytics stack with interactive FX liquidity tooling and high-performance grids so traders could act on large live datasets faster.
description: Developed full-stack trading analytics platform using React, Next.js, Kubernetes, and MongoDB, leveraging AI-driven trade reports enhance market predictions and decision-making for traders
Utilized Redux for state management and React Query for API integration and caching, reducing API call latency by 40% and ensuring real-time updates for datasets exceeding 20K rows

Introduced interactive Liquidity Matrix feature to analyzes & visualizes FX market liquidity across 24 trading hours, providing actionable insights with an interactive and concise interface to improve trading decisions
Leveraged Highcharts, AG Grid, and React Virtualized to improve index analytics performance by 35% with dynamic visualizations & auto-complete filtering, delivering a seamless user experience

experience.label: CGI Inc - Jan 2024

Designed and deployed a PostgreSQL database integrated with Keycloak, streamlining authentication process
Leveraged Terraform to automate infrastructure provisioning, which optimized deployment time by up to 70%, significant enhancing operational efficiency

experience.label: JANA - May 2023

description: Developed backend solutions using C#, ASP.NET, and SQL Server, contributing to the architecture, implementation, and maintenance of pipeline integrity management application
Led the optimization of SQL queries, significantly enhancing the performance of the data management REST API, which improved dynamic data retrieval and display
Introduced new visualization feature that displayed risk level results for predictive risk analysis, aiding in better decision-making for pipeline integrity management
Lead migration of APIs to a high-performance serialization library, boosting API performance by up to 50%

featuredProjects.title: G.R.A.C.E.
featuredProjects.description: An AI-powered social companion that engages isolated users through lifelike face-to-face conversations with real-time voice-to-avatar interactions. Features lip-synced 3D avatars and a comprehensive caregiver dashboard with conversation analytics.

projects.title: RTSP Secure Sync
projects.description: Archives remote RTSP on a home NAS: an edge node chunks and buffers locally, syncs over a private tunnel, and the server reassembles segments into uninterrupted playback—so links can drop without losing footage or breaking the viewing experience.
features: Tailscale VPN between the remote property and home network for encrypted, peer-to-peer transit
Pi edge gateway: intercepts RTSP, chunks to an external drive, and rsyncs with backlog catch-up after outages
Go stack watches the ingest directory, stitches .mp4 chunks into one timeline, and serves reassembled streams
Svelte UI for browsing the indexed timeline and watching footage as if it were a single file
Runs on OpenMediaVault under a dedicated camera_service account with strict permissions on archives

projects.title: Atrangi Eventz
projects.description: Secure Ticketing platform with venue check-in for student run organization that connects student across Ontario via cultural events.
features: High-performance, cost-efficient ticketing: card checkout, receipts, confirmations, secure payments
Drop-day traffic: accurate seats under concurrent buyers, no overselling, lean infrastructure
Host event media and send automated emails for orders, reminders, and updates
QR codes at the door for fast admission and shorter lines
Internal portal for club admins and day-to-day operations, with Instagram wired in for social and marketing workflows

projects.title: Memento
projects.description: Android app for uploading, storing, and revisiting personal and shared memories through a Compose-driven, map-aware interface, backed by a FastAPI service that integrates Firebase and is deployed with Docker.
features: Jetpack Compose UI with Material 3, adaptive navigation suite, and extended icons
Image workflows with Coil, EXIF metadata, and background jobs via WorkManager
Google Maps and Maps Compose for location-linked memories
Dockerized FastAPI backend integrated with Firebase for server-side flows alongside the mobile client

projects.title: UWDSC Website
projects.description: Monorepo for the UW Data Science Club's official website.
features: One-tap event check-in with instant attendance synced to PostgreSQL
Check-in gated on membership, MathSoc status, and buffered event start/end windows
QR codes for membership payment that deep-link execs to admin mark-paid actions
Monorepo with shared UI packages, web and admin apps, and unified CI/CD
Internal developer portal with automation for infrastructure and deployment
Private Node.js package for unified API responses and aggregated error reporting

projects.title: UWDSC Speed Dataing
projects.description: UW Data Science Club's web app for the speed-dating event: registration and surveys, OpenAI embedding-based matchmaking.
features: UW Data Science Club in-person speed-dating night: timed rounds with a new partner each round so members meet many peers in one evening
Structured surveys feed each round through Next.js form-status and form-submit APIs
Similarity matching algorithm with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small vectors stored in database
Dashboard and history for each round's live match assignment
Admin portal to manage event gated behind main UWDSC website auth
